hooks.command: command -v slopscore >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'The slopscore plugin needs its CLI and it is not installed, so the agent commits are not being scored. Offer to install it now: uv tool install slopscore (fallbacks: pipx install slopscore, or pip install --user slopscore). After installing, also offer to run slopscore install-hooks in this repo - the plugin only scores commits the agent makes; the git hooks score the user commits too.'
